steps.title: Substitute the given Fahrenheit temperature and isolate the fraction
steps.content:
Start with the conversion formula. Since $h = 809.33$ degrees Fahrenheit, substitute this value and subtract 32 from both sides to isolate the fraction containing $u$:

$$809.33 = \frac{9(u-273.15)}{5} + 32$$

$$809.33 - 32 = \frac{9(u-273.15)}{5}$$

$$777.33 = \frac{9(u-273.15)}{5}$$

steps.title: Eliminate the fraction by multiplying by 5 and dividing by 9
Add 273.15 to solve for u
steps.content:
Finally, add 273.15 to both sides to isolate $u$:

$$u = 431.85 + 273.15$$

$$u = 705$$

The corresponding temperature is 705 kelvins.
